regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran escalates military conflict, reports Armenian casualty, rows with Lebanon
bullets: Iran claims destruction of a $700 million US surveillance plane at a Saudi base, escalating force activity and cross-border risk.
The first Iranian Armenian killed in strikes highlights severe civilian stress within Iran's conflict zones.
Iran's expelled ambassador refusing to leave Lebanon deepens diplomatic tensions with regional implications.
